titleStmt.title: SII 34.271: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 271. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Kṛishṇarāya, Śaka 1445, Śubhānu, Uttarāyaṇa, badi 11, Friday, Mūla = A.D. 1524, January 31, Sunday (not Friday).

It was decided by the nāṭṭār of Valla-naḍu that all the taxes on the Veḷḷāḷa and other tenants (kuḍigaḷ) of Pālaikkuḍi, Kaḷaṅguḍi and Kiḷinallūr in Kiḷippayiṟṟūr-nāḍu a part of Valla-nāḍu should be given to the temple of Araṅguḷanāthar at Tiruvaraṅguḷam in Valla-nāḍu from now on seeking divine intervention to protect the nāḍu from the evil effects (dōsham) of some bad planetary configuration (aṭṭatti in Kumba-rāsi). The villages had been a kuḍi-nīṅgā-dēvadāna of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī rājādhirājan rācaparamEśvaraṉ śrīvīrappiṟatāpan Emmaṇṭalamum koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkṛṣṇarāyar prathivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāptam 1000 4 100 4 10 5 ṉ mEl cellāṉiṉṟa cupāṉu caṅvatsarattu Uttarāyana
ttu kṛṣṇapakkattu Ēkaāteciyum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa mūlaṉāḷ rācarāca vaḷaṉāṭṭu valla nāṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṅkuḷam Uṭaiyaṉāyaṉār Āticaṇḍeśvaratēvaṟku Iṉāṭāka Icainta nāṭṭavarōm kalveṭṭi kuṭuttapaṭi Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭu ppi
ṟivāṉa kiḷippayiṟṟūr ṉāṭṭup pālaikkuṭi kaḷaṅkuṭi kiḷi nallūr Immūṉṟu vayalum kuḷamu kuḷappuravum muṉṉāḷ ṉāṅkaḷ ṉāṭākap pūcaippaṇikkum tiruttēr tiruṉāḷukku kuṭinīṅkāttēvatāṉam kuṭinīkkā tēvatāṉam Āka
kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkuṭuttu Inta kaḷ kōyil paṇṭārattilē naṭantu varum mūṉṟūril kuṭiyaiyum nāṅkaḷ Āḷvarik koṇṭu varukaiyil cupānu varuṣam māci mātam
kumparāciyilē Aṭṭatti kūṭukaiyil Attōṣam Eṅkaḷ ṉāṭṭukku varāmal pōka Immūṉṟu Ūrōmum nattamum nattappāṭum vayalum vayal puṟavum kiṇaṟum mēṉōkkiya maramum puṟṟum tiṭṭum
Immūṉṟūril kuṭiyāṉa veḷḷāḻar piṟakuṭikaḷ kaṭamai Ūḻiyaṅkaḷ maṟṟum Eppēṟpaṭṭa
ṉavum tampirāṉār Araṅkuḷanātaṟkē Iṟuttu Ūḻiyam paṇṇumpaṭi caṟuvamāṉiyamāka cantirātittava
rai cellak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkuṭuttō
m Intak kalveṭṭuppaṭikku vikātam coṉavan Araṅkuḷa nātan caṉṉatikkum turōkiyāy pañca pā
takarāyp pōka kaṭavaṉākavum Immūṉṟūrum māṉiyam paṇṇikkuṭuttōm yin
ṉāyaṉār Araṅkuḷa ṉātaṟku vallaṉāṭṭu nā
ṭāka Icainta ṉāṭṭavarōm vallanāṭṭu nā
ṭṭava coṟpaṭikku nāṭṭukkaṇakku ṉāṭumati
tta kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu śivabrahmaha
surapāne svaṇala pemadhāpivā
laṅghanegurū vākyantu gopate pantu
pātakam . śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 34.271 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
